series_metadata.series_description: Documents entire investigation process, including sexual abuse investigations, describing the facts found while conducting an investigation involving an employee or offender''s alleged violation of policy, procedure, or Ohio Revised Code

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: inmate has reached final release, expiration of sentence, death, or employee is no longer employed by agency. ; Electronic: inmate has reached final release, expiration of sentence, death, or employee is no longer employed by agency
